Let me analyze the conflicts in both files:

## 1. `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

The conflict is about the pnpm version in the setup step. Both sides have the same structure but different versions:
- HEAD (PR #1558): `version: 10.33.0`
- origin/dev: `<empty>` (no version specified)

Looking at the conflict markers, it seems the `=======` separator shows nothing after it for dev, meaning dev didn't specify a version. Since HEAD explicitly sets a version (10.33.0), I should keep HEAD's version. This is a deliberate choice in the PR to pin the pnpm version.

## 2. `tests/int/lesson-duplication-orchestrator.int.spec.ts`

This is more complex. Let me compare:

**HEAD side:**
- Mock throws for ALL calls
- Simple implementation that always throws

**origin/dev side:**
- More sophisticated mock with call-count tracking
- Only throws on the 3rd call (exercise index 2)
- Returns valid exercise data for other calls

Looking at the test description:
- "5-exercise lesson with one forced failure → needs_review with 4 succeeded + 1 failure entry"

This suggests the test expects one exercise to fail while others succeed. The dev version implements this correctly (fails only on 3rd call). The HEAD version fails all calls, which wouldn't match the test's expectations.

The test's acceptance criteria says:
- "2. One exercise failing does not abort the run — remaining exercises complete"
- "5. 5-exercise lesson with one forced failure → needs_review with 4 succeeded + 1 failure entry"

So I should take origin/dev's version because it correctly implements the expected behavior (only one failure, not all failures).

Let me read both files to get the full context and resolve them properly.

file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
<<<<<<< HEAD
        with:
          version: 10.33.0
=======
>>>>>>> origin/dev

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

288	    while ((record.status === 'running' || record.status === 'pending') && Date.now() < deadline) {

293	        depth: 0,
294	        overrideAccess: true,
295	      })

298	    return record as any

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true
